allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if \($r.Content.Contains\('一个人'\)\) { Write-Output "Found 一个人" } else { Write-Output "NOT FOUND" }; if \($r.Content.Contains\('顶三个'\)\) { Write-Output "Found 顶三个" } else { Write-Output "顶三个 not found" }; if \($r.Content.Contains\('招生员'\)\) { Write-Output "Found 招生员" } else { Write-Output "招生员 not found" })
